tasks.label: Start UPI Analytics Server
tasks.command: cd /d "c:\Users\KHUSHI\conversation" && taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>nul & timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul & python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload

tasks.label: Restart UPI Analytics Server
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>nul & timeout /t 2 & cd c:\Users\KHUSHI\conversation && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload

tasks.label: UPI Performance Server
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>nul & ping -n 3 127.0.0.1 >nul & cd c:\Users\KHUSHI\conversation && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload

tasks.label: UPI Server Final
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>nul & ping -n 3 127.0.0.1 >nul & cd c:\Users\KHUSHI\conversation && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload
